overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic dystopian city at dusk. The journey transitions from beneath an elevated concrete highway through an open intersection with sunset skies and into a covered walkway bathed in intense yellow neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway pedestrian walkway with neon storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, moving toward the open intersection ahead

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure casting shadows over the walkway
building facade with glowing red and white neon signage
illuminated advertisement sign visible in the distance
yellow textured paving stones marking the pedestrian path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a concrete sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, with the massive concrete structure overhead and neon-lit buildings to the right. The path is marked with yellow tactile paving, and the dusk sky is visible ahead where the overpass ends.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection at dusk with traffic control

events.description: exits the covered highway underpass into the open intersection with visible sunset sky
pedestrians gather at the crosswalk waiting for the traffic signal to change

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the crosswalk at the intersection, navigating through gathered pedestrians

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving through the intersection on the left side

entered.detail: tall pole with illuminated traffic signals and pedestrian crossing lights
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt
silhouette of futuristic skyscrapers against the sunset sky

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide urban intersection at dusk, with the sunset sky visible above and futuristic skyscrapers silhouetted on the horizon. The character approaches a crosswalk where pedestrians wait for the signal, while futuristic vehicles drive through the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with corporate advertising and glass towers

events.description: approaching and entering the covered walkway with intense artificial lighting

agents.ego_description: walking along the street toward a covered passage, passing large corporate billboards

entered.detail: massive digital display showing a red sports car with text about next-generation transportation
tall modern skyscrapers with reflective glass facades dominating the background
dark entrance to a covered pedestrian passage with glowing lights inside

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the intersection along a commercial street lined with massive digital billboards advertising futuristic vehicles. Glass corporate towers rise in the background against the fading sunset as the character approaches a covered walkway entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with intense yellow neon ceiling lighting

events.description: entering the covered corridor with intense yellow neon strip lighting overhead

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered corridor beneath rows of bright yellow neon lights

entered.detail: rows of intense yellow neon tube lights illuminating the covered walkway ceiling
enclosed pedestrian passage with concrete walls and overhead structure
digital billboards and signs mounted on the walkway walls

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered walkway bathed in intense yellow neon light from overhead strips. The enclosed corridor features concrete support columns and commercial advertisements on the walls, creating a stark contrast to the open sunset scene outside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the oppressive shadow of an urban overpass into a vibrant sunset intersection and finally into a neon-drenched corridor. It begins with the character walking along a concrete sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway, flanked by neon-lit buildings and yellow tactile paving. As the overpass ends, the scene opens into a wide urban intersection where futuristic vehicles glide past pedestrians under a fading sunset sky and silhouetted skyscrapers. The camera then follows the character past massive digital billboards and glass corporate towers before turning toward the entrance of a covered walkway. Finally, the environment shifts abruptly as the character enters the enclosed corridor, leaving the open sky behind for a space bathed in intense yellow neon light and lined with concrete columns.
